23.dv: from H3823 (לָבַב); used also like H3820 (לֵב)

23.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
23.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

23.gl: properly, to penetrate; hence, to examine intimately
23.kj: find out, (make) search (out), seek (out), sound, try.

23.gl: to test (especially metals); generally and figuratively, to investigate

24.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
24.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

24.gl: properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
24.kj: alway(-s), ancient (time), any more, continuance, eternal, (for, (n-)) ever(-lasting, -more, of old), lasting, long (time), (of) old (time), perpetual, at any time, (beginning of t

24.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
24.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

24.gl: to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists)
24.kj: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

24.gl: an idol (as fashioned); also pain (bodily or mental)
